auditor: Fort Group Chartered Professional Accountants Inc.
one_time_description: Flood Claim Settlement expenses recognized in fiscal 2020
economic_notes: Operations include Tim Hortons franchise (Waaninaawagaang Developments LP), forestry (Obishikokaang Resources Corporation), Lac Seul Generating Station limited partnership, casino revenue (RBC Casino Rama), and flood claim settlement trust.
notes: Prior year (2019) figures are restated. Large consolidation including 13+ entities. Flood Claim Settlement is a significant one-time segment with $3.4M expenses in 2020 and none in 2019. Investments restricted in Lac Seul First Nation Trust of $21,355,717. Trust liabilities of $750,829 appeared in 2020 with no prior year balance. The 2019 statements were audited by a different auditor. Expenses_housing combines Ke-nawind Housing Development Authority ($1,055,476) and Lac Seul CMHC Housing Authority ($1,126,958). num_subsidiaries estimated at 13 based on consolidation list in Note 2(c).
